failures.description: The agent made an ill-formed ProductCatalogSearch call by omitting item_id and using product_id=0 instead of the provided string product_id "1656367028".
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was clear: call ProductCatalogSearch using item_id "1151293680" and product_id "1656367028", then answer whether backlight=RGB. At index 2, the agent had all required information from the Coordinator plan, but invoked/prepared the tool with malformed arguments: {"product_id": 0}. This omitted the required item_id and changed product_id from a string ID to integer 0. The tool then explicitly returned a SchemaError at index 3, confirming the invocation was invalid.
